title: elaeocarpus coodei
intro: Elaeocarpus coodei is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae, commonly known as the Coode's blueberry or blue olive. It is native to Borneo and is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues. Elaeocarpus coodei can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, allowing for its herbal properties to be utilized in the treatment of various ailments.
